component.name: PDFPixel
component.summary: Convert each PDF page to a PNG image

description.p: PDFPixel renders every page of a PDF to a PNG image. Open a PDF with PDFPixel to convert all of its pages; the images are written alongside the source file.

Note: the desktop/AUR packages add an inline "Convert to Images" right-click menu (with a custom page-range option) to GNOME Files, Nemo, Caja and Dolphin. The Flatpak runs sandboxed, so it integrates via "Open With" and converts all pages.
